applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)
applicable_policies.notes: Article 5 delegates all approval thresholds to 03_authorization_management.md Appendix 2 (附件二). Article 14 explicitly repeals 02_expense_reimbursement_2022_deprecated.md.

applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
applicable_policies.notes: Article 1: retained for institutional history only. Article 4: thresholds explicitly superseded; must not be used as current approval basis.

applicable_policies.title: XX证券授权管理办法
applicable_policies.notes: Article 2: Appendix 2 (附件二) is the definitive source for expense reimbursement approval thresholds. Article 5: effective 2025-01-01. Appendix 2 contains 5 tiers (AR-01 through AR-05).

threshold_comparison.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2022 deprecated thresholds vs 2025 current thresholds (via 03_authorization_management.md 附件二)

2025_thresholds.approver: 部门经理 + 财务复核 (Department Manager + Financial Review)
总经理办公会 (General Manager's Office)

version_trap_zones.2022_approver: (no explicit threshold — implicitly unregulated or lowest-level approval)
version_trap_zones.risk: NEW_REQUIREMENT — expenses below 3,000 now require formal department manager approval where none was explicitly required before

version_trap_zones.2022_approver: (no explicit threshold — implicitly unregulated or lowest-level approval)
version_trap_zones.2025_approver: 部门经理 + 财务复核
version_trap_zones.risk: NEW_REQUIREMENT — expenses from 3,000 now require department manager approval PLUS financial review that did not exist in 2022

version_trap_zones.2025_approver: 部门经理 + 财务复核
version_trap_zones.risk: THRESHOLD_SHIFT — in 2022 these amounts required department general manager; in 2025 they only need department manager + financial review. This is a DOWNGRADE in approver seniority, though financial review adds a control not present in 2022.
version_trap_zones.direction: LOOSER (lower approver rank) but with added financial review control

version_trap_zones.risk: THRESHOLD_SHIFT — VP approval was required in 2022; department general manager suffices in 2025. Significant delegation downward for amounts up to 50,000.
THRESHOLD_SHIFT — 2022 had no upper cap on VP authority; 2025 introduces a new highest tier requiring General Manager's Office collective approval for amounts ≥200,000.

cross_references.description: Cross-reference chain from 2025 expense policy to authorization thresholds

chain.mechanism: Direct delegation: '单笔费用报销的审批权限,不在本办法正文列示具体金额,统一按《XX证券授权管理办法》附件二执行' (Approval authority for individual expense reimbursements is not listed in this document; uniformly executed per Authorization Management Policy Appendix 2).
chain.purpose: Primary threshold source — system must auto-derive approver roles from Appendix 2

chain.to_clause: 附件二 higher approval line (较高审批线)
chain.mechanism: Anti-splitting rule: aggregate of same employee + same expense type within 7 days reaching the higher approval line triggers investigation for split-claim avoidance.
chain.purpose: Fraud detection — uses Appendix 2 tiers as aggregation threshold

chain.mechanism: Explicit repeal: '原《XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)》同时废止' (Original 2022 edition is simultaneously abolished).
chain.purpose: Version supersession — 2022 thresholds are legally void

validity_status.summary: Only the 2025 policy suite is currently valid. The 2022 expense policy is explicitly repealed and explicitly marked as not to be used for current approval decisions.

key_findings: The 2025 expense reimbursement policy (01, XX证财规〔2025〕甲号) does not contain its own approval thresholds; Article 5 delegates entirely to the Authorization Management Policy (03, XX证综规〔2025〕丙号) Appendix 2 (附件二).

The 2025 Authorization Management Policy Appendix 2 defines 5 approval tiers (AR-01 through AR-05) with thresholds at 3,000 / 10,000 / 50,000 / 200,000 CNY — a much more granular scheme than the 2022 version's 2 tiers.

The 2022 expense policy (02, XX证财规〔2022〕乙号) had only 2 approval thresholds: 8,000 CNY → Department General Manager, 30,000 CNY → VP. It was explicitly repealed by Article 14 of the 2025 policy effective 2025-01-01.

Five version trap zones were identified where old and new thresholds materially differ: [0-3000), [3000-8000), [8000-10000), [30000-50000), and [200000+). Three zones are tighter in 2025, two are looser.
The 2022 policy (Article 4) explicitly warns that its thresholds have been superseded and must not be used for current approval decisions.

The 2025 policy introduces an anti-splitting rule (Article 11) that cross-references Appendix 2's higher approval line — any same-employee, same-type claims within 7 days aggregating to that line trigger split-avoidance investigation.
All three documents' effective dates align at 2025-01-01: the 2025 expense policy and authorization policy took effect, and the 2022 policy was simultaneously repealed.
unresolved_items: The 2022 policy does not state its own effective date — the year '2022' is inferred from the document title 'XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)' and the document number 'XX证财规〔2022〕乙号'.
The 2022 policy does not define thresholds below 8,000 CNY — whether there were implicit lower-tier approvals or simply no requirement is not documented.
